blended.narrative: Mont Blanc is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: light rain showers, highs of 50°F.
Wednesday: 7" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 6" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
